productName: Stars & Rosin - 99 Sunsets x Purple Push Pop rosin - .5g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of 99 Sunsets, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
